---
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
---


# Overview

{{< include _research-cycle-handbook.qmd >}}

# 1. Plan & Design

{{< include _plan-and-design.qmd >}}

# 2. Collect & Manage

{{< include _collect-and-manage.qmd >}}

# 3. Analyze & Collaborate

{{< include _analyze-and-collaborate.qmd >}}

# 4. Preserve & Share

{{< include _preserve-and-share.qmd >}}
